alkylation reagent: alkylated with the addition of 1/10 volume of 100 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: addition of 1/10 volume of 100 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: enzymatic digestion at 37 °C with chymotrypsin for 16 h
collision energy: HCD activation with a collision energy of 28%
fragmentation method: HCD activation with a collision energy of 28%
instrument: LC-MS/MS on the Thermo Scientific Orbitrap Fusion
labeling: Each sample was then further diluted with MS loading buffer to 0.08 µg/µl, with 0.4ug (5 µl) injected for LC-MS/MS analysis.
reduction reagent: addition of 1/10 volume of 45 mM dithiothreitol
reduction concentration: addition of 1/10 volume of 45 mM dithiothreitol
